notes: All 128 cells in this band are non-empty. This band is almost entirely spell/skill/status-effect iconography (no weapons, armor, or potions). Rows 8-9 = light/dark/fire/water/ice/lightning FX; row 10 = nature/earth elements; row 11 = slash/pierce/beam skill marks; row 12 = ghost/soul and orb status icons; row 13 = bubbles, barriers, buff/debuff bars; row 14 = time (hourglasses/clocks), wings, blood, stars; row 15 = tiny stick-figure action/pose icons. Useful to an MMO mostly as ability icons, status-effect bar icons, and a handful of trophy/gem/material candidates.

cells.name: gold_sparkle_burst
cells.notes: Yellow four-point sparkle with a cluster of small gold diamonds around it.

cells.name: gold_sparkles_scatter
cells.notes: Three small gold diamond sparkles scattered, no central burst.
